Accreditation

A total of 4 departments in 2 faculties at our university hold accreditation certificates. Accreditation efforts are ongoing for our other faculties and departments.

ACCREDITING INSTITUTION

ACCREDITATION PERIOD

Computer Engineering

Association for Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Programs (MÜDEK)

01.05.2016 – 30.09.2027

Electrical-Electronics Engineering

Association for Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Programs (MÜDEK)

01.05.2016 – 30.09.2027

Association for Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Programs (MÜDEK)

01.05.2016 – 30.09.2027

Psychology

22.01.2026-21.01.2031

EAQUALS

01.01.2026-31.12.2029

The Faculty of Communication of our university has started the accreditation process of the Communication Research Association (ILAD) as of 2025 for the following departments:

Visual Communication Design

Public Relations and Publicity

Radio, Television and Cinema

Advertising

New Media
